calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for and with Timothy Schmitz.

The Court stated that it read/reviewed all of the time entries and that it did not have any questions regarding the matter. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-09-2010 Continued To Nov-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-02-2010 Continued To Nov-09-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for Timothy Schmitz (Administrator). Antonio Salazar-Hobson for Timothy Schmitz (Administrator).

Mr. Salazar-Hobson stated that this was a classic warehouse case, that there were $612,000.00 worth of hospital bills that were being disputed and that the hospital never filed a Creditor's Claim. In addition, he stated that his hourly rate was reduced, and that he did fair and competent work. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
